No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and explicitly trains students with vocational skills for employment in the sound media industry (Target 4.4).

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to clean water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly prepares students for 'practical talents in digital convergence media' by developing 'skills and expertise' and fostering 'creativity,' directly supporting decent job creation and economic productivity (Targets 8.2, 8.3, 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course focuses on the 'sound media industry ecosystem' and 'digital convergence trends,' training students to use 'radio station related equipment,' directly engaging with industry, innovation, and ICT (Targets 9.2, 9.b, 9.c).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to sustainable cities and communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to responsible consumption and production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course trains students to produce 'news' and 'call-in programs,' which can indirectly contribute to public access to information (Target 16.10).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course includes 'media visits' and collaboration with a 'professional dubbing master team,' demonstrating multi-stakeholder partnerships between academia and industry (Target 17.17).
